task_completion.description: Verify that the clutter bookmarks are deleted and the 4 specific folders are created on the bookmark bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chrome bookmark bar displays folders named 'Web Archives', 'Metadata Standards', 'Repositories', and 'Crawl Tools'. There should be no visible bookmarks for Netflix, Reddit, BuzzFeed, Twitter, or X.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required Chrome flags are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chrome://flags page is open, and both 'Save Page as MHTML' and 'Enable Reader Mode' are visible and set to 'Enabled' (typically highlighted with a blue dot or moved to the top of the list).

task_completion.description: Verify that the custom 'Wayback' search engine is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings under 'Manage search engines and site search', there is an entry with Name 'Wayback', Shortcut 'ia', and URL containing 'web.archive.org/web'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the download directory is set to the Web_Archives folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings under 'Downloads', the 'Location' path ends with '/home/ga/Documents/Web_Archives'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Chrome is configured to ask where to save each file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings under 'Downloads', the toggle switch for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned on (appears blue/active).

task_completion.description: Verify that page preloading is disabled in Privacy and Security.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Chrome Settings under 'Privacy and security' -> 'Preload pages' (or 'Performance'), the option 'No preloading' is selected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Chrome browser interface (Settings pages, Bookmark Manager, Flags page) being navigated, rather than terminal commands modifying SQLite or JSON files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real Chrome browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements match genuine Chrome browser components (address bar, tabs, settings sidebars) and not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use automated scripts to bypass manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a visual progression of the agent clicking through Chrome menus, typing in fields, and toggling switches, rather than a single terminal script execution.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The required bookmark folders are exactly: 'Web Archives', 'Metadata Standards', 'Repositories', and 'Crawl Tools'. The domains to be deleted are netflix.com, reddit.com, buzzfeed.com, twitter.com, and x.com. The required Chrome flags are 'save-page-as-mhtml' and 'enable-reader-mode'. The custom search engine must have the shortcut 'ia' and point to 'archive.org/web'. The download directory must be set to 'Web_Archives'.
